notes: Gym Heroes (WotC, released 2000-08-14), pokemontcg id gym1. Standard early-WotC structure confirmed by multiple fetched sources: 11-card pack = 7 common + 3 uncommon + 1 rare-or-better (DA Card World 1st-Ed booster-box listing + Bulbapedia "Base Set through Neo Destiny = 11 cards"). Rare slot: a Holo Rare appears ~1 in 3 packs (Flipside Gaming rarity review: "Rare (guaranteed 1 per pack), and Holo (approximately 1:3 packs)"; corroborated by PokeBeach forum era-odds discussion), so the rare slot resolves to rare-holo 1/3 and non-holo rare 2/3. NO reverse-holo slot — reverse foils were introduced with Legendary Collection (2002), after the Gym era (Bulbapedia + Flipside both state this explicitly). Booster box = 36 packs (WotC standard); no ETB existed in the WotC era. Confidence LOW: the 1-in-3 holo figure is the WotC era-average rate applied without a Gym-Heroes-specific large opening study (no such study is sourceable for this vintage set); per-card uniformity within each bucket is assumed by the engine. Distribution keys are a subset of the set's available buckets {rare-holo, uncommon, common, rare}; each slot sums to exactly 1.0. Vintage sealed boxes carry a large collector premium, so EV/booster is expected to sit well below the sealed pack/box market price — that gap is not compensated for in the rates.
